allow: PowerShell(schtasks /query /fo LIST 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "TaskName|Status" | Select-String -Pattern "blog|Blog|BLOG|DivyaDarshan|divya"; Write-Output "---all tasknames---"; Get-ScheduledTask -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -match "blog|divya|sync|darshan" -or $_.Description -match "blog|divya" } | Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State)

PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $task = $_; $_.Actions | ForEach-Object { if \($_.Execute -match "run-sync|blog_sheet_sync" -or $_.Arguments -match "run-sync|blog_sheet_sync"\) { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $task.TaskName; Path = $task.TaskPath; Exec = $_.Execute; Args = $_.Arguments } } } })

PowerShell($found = Get-ScheduledTask -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $task = $_; foreach \($a in $_.Actions\) { if \(\($a.Execute + " " + $a.Arguments\) -match "blog_sheet|run-sync|divya"\) { [PSCustomObject]@{ Name = $task.TaskName; Path = $task.TaskPath; State = $task.State; Action = "$\($a.Execute\) $\($a.Arguments\)" } } } }; if \($found\) { $found | Format-List } else { "No matching scheduled task found." })

PowerShell($t = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'DivyaDarshan Blog Sheet Sync'; "TaskName : $\($t.TaskName\)"; "State    : $\($t.State\)"; "User     : $\($t.Principal.UserId\)"; "LogonType: $\($t.Principal.LogonType\)"; "Trigger  : Daily at $\($t.Triggers[0].StartBoundary\)"; "Action   : $\($t.Actions[0].Execute\) $\($t.Actions[0].Arguments\)"; "WorkDir  : $\($t.Actions[0].WorkingDirectory\)"; $info = $t | Get-ScheduledTaskInfo; "NextRun  : $\($info.NextRunTime\)")
